channel.title: The Armoury Blog — Arsenal FC News, Tactics & Culture
channel.description: Independent Arsenal FC blog covering match reports, transfer news, tactics, club history and fan opinion.

item.title: Arsenal 3–1 Chelsea: Saka Masterclass Seals Derby Bragging Rights
item.dc:creator: Jamie Whitfield
item.description: Bukayo Saka was simply unplayable at the Emirates as Arsenal dismantled Chelsea to extend their Premier League lead to five points. Full match report and analysis.

item.title: How Arteta's 4-3-3 Has Evolved Into the Most Fluid System in the Premier League
item.dc:creator: Daniel Osei
item.description: From rigid positional play to a dynamic, press-heavy system — we break down the tactical evolution that has Arsenal on the cusp of a historic title.

item.title: The Bruised Banana: How Arsenal's Most Hated Kit Became a Cultural Icon
item.dc:creator: Priya Sharma
item.description: The 1991–93 Arsenal away shirt was mocked on arrival and worshipped within a decade. The story of football's most unlikely fashion icon.

item.title: Five Realistic Transfer Targets Arsenal Must Pursue This Summer
item.dc:creator: Jamie Whitfield
item.description: With the title race heating up, Edu and Arteta are already plotting the squad upgrades needed to sustain a Champions League challenge next season.

item.title: The Case for Bukayo Saka as the Best Right Winger in World Football
item.dc:creator: Aisha Mensah
item.description: Numbers, moments and the intangible quality that separates Saka from every other wide player on the planet right now.
